experienceTipsZh: 建议日落前 30 分钟到达，正对陆家嘴的机位最出片。
周末与节假日人潮密集，可考虑工作日傍晚前往。
外滩观景台无需门票，附近便利店可买瓶装水。
experienceTipsEn: Arrive 30 minutes before sunset for the best Lujiazui skyline shots.
Weekends and Chinese holidays are very crowded — prefer weekday evenings.
The waterfront promenade is free; convenience stores nearby sell water.

experienceTipsZh: 售票处可使用支付宝 / 微信支付，但仅 ¥50 现金更稳妥。
园内导览牌有英文，但建议下载一份离线语音讲解。
周一闭园，安排行程时务必避开。
experienceTipsEn: Tickets accept Alipay / WeChat Pay, but ¥50 cash is safer at the booth.
On-site signs include English, but a downloaded audio guide helps.
Closed on Mondays — plan around this.

experienceTipsZh: 建议工作日前往，周末排队可达 60 分钟。
票价 ¥160–¥220，傍晚登塔可以一次看到日景与夜景。
透明观光廊有体重限制，请提前了解。
experienceTipsEn: Weekdays are far less crowded; weekend queues can hit 60 minutes.
Tickets range ¥160–¥220 — visit at sunset for day and night views in one trip.
The glass skywalk has a weight limit; check before booking.

experienceTipsZh: 全长步行需 1.5 小时，建议穿舒适的鞋子。
建议从人民广场出发向东走到外滩，可以一次性体验历史与现代。
夜间有观光小火车，单程 ¥50。
experienceTipsEn: Walking the full stretch takes ~1.5 hours — wear comfortable shoes.
Start at People's Square and head east to the Bund for history + skyline in one walk.
A tourist tram runs at night for ¥50 one-way.

experienceTipsZh: 餐厅多数提供英文菜单，但小馆子只有中文菜单。
建议提前预约，尤其是周末晚餐。
新天地南里停车较贵，可搭乘地铁 10/13 号线新天地站。
experienceTipsEn: Most restaurants have English menus, smaller spots are Chinese-only.
Reservations recommended, especially for weekend dinner.
Parking is expensive — take Metro Line 10/13 to Xintiandi station.

experienceTipsZh: 巷弄非常狭窄，错峰前往比较舒适。
部分咖啡店只收现金或微信支付，备少量现金。
下午 5 点后人流会增加，建议上午或傍晚 7 点后。
experienceTipsEn: Lanes are very narrow — visit off-peak for a more relaxed stroll.
Some cafés are cash / WeChat only — keep small bills handy.
Crowds pick up after 5pm; mornings or after 7pm are quieter.

experienceTipsZh: 建议从武康大楼开始，沿武康路—安福路—五原路步行约 2 小时。
沿途咖啡店和买手店较多，可随时休息。
梧桐落叶季节（11 月底—12 月）景色最佳。
experienceTipsEn: Start at the Wukang Mansion and walk Wukang → Anfu → Wuyuan Rd (~2h).
Plenty of cafés and boutiques along the way for rest stops.
Late November to December is the most photogenic season (plane-tree leaves).

experienceTipsZh: 门票 ¥50，建议现金。
早晨 8 点前往可避开人潮并闻到香火气息。
地铁 2/7 号线静安寺站 6 号出口直达。
experienceTipsEn: Entrance fee ¥50, cash recommended.
Arrive around 8am to avoid crowds and enjoy the incense atmosphere.
Direct access via Metro Line 2/7 Jing'an Temple station exit 6.

experienceTipsZh: 免费开放，但需提前 1–7 天在官网或小程序预约。
每周一闭馆，安排行程时务必避开。
馆内提供中英日韩四种语言的语音导览。
experienceTipsEn: Free entry, but reserve 1–7 days ahead on the official site or mini-program.
Closed on Mondays — keep this in mind when planning.
Audio guides are available in Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean.

experienceTipsZh: 招牌菜：缅甸茶叶沙拉、香茅烤鱼、酸笋牛肉。
建议提前 1 天预约，靠窗景观位更佳。
素食选项丰富，注明 vegan 即可。
experienceTipsEn: Must-try: Burmese tea-leaf salad, lemongrass-grilled fish, bamboo-beef curry.
Book a day ahead and request a window seat for the best atmosphere.
Good vegan options — just ask.

experienceTipsZh: 招牌：蟹粉鲜肉汤包、鲜肉汤包、虾仁汤包。
建议工作日上午 10 点前往，避开排队高峰。
没有英文菜单，但柜台有图示可指。
experienceTipsEn: Must-try: crab-roe pork, classic pork, and shrimp xiaolongbao.
Visit on weekday mornings around 10am to skip the queue.
No English menu, but the counter has photos you can point at.

experienceTipsZh: 外滩最佳景观位房型需提前 1 个月预订。
下午茶需提前预约，套餐 ¥588/人起。
可免费使用酒店劳斯莱斯接送服务（需提前 24 小时预约）。
experienceTipsEn: Book Bund-view rooms at least one month in advance.
Afternoon tea reservations required; set menu from ¥588 / person.
Complimentary Rolls-Royce transfers within city — book 24h ahead.

experienceTipsZh: 距市中心 40 分钟车程，建议预订含晚餐套餐。
酒店可安排往返市区的接送服务。
10 月至次年 4 月的香樟林最美。
experienceTipsEn: About 40 min from city center — book a room with dinner included.
The hotel can arrange return transfers to downtown.
The camphor forest is most beautiful October through April.

experienceTipsZh: 地铁 3/4/13 号线金沙江路站直达。
周日客流量大，建议工作日前往。
免费 Wi-Fi 覆盖全场。
experienceTipsEn: Direct access via Metro Lines 3 / 4 / 13 at Jinshajiang Road station.
Sunday afternoons are very busy — prefer weekdays.
Free Wi-Fi throughout.

experienceTipsZh: 店员全英文，沟通无障碍。
Today at Apple 课程免费，需提前 7 天预约。
Apple Vision Pro 体验需提前 1 天预约。
experienceTipsEn: Staff are fully bilingual — no language barrier.
Today at Apple sessions are free, but book 7 days ahead.
Apple Vision Pro demos need 1-day advance reservation.

experienceTipsZh: 提前在官网购票比现场便宜 ¥30，且免排队。
日落时段（16:30–18:00）门票最抢手，建议提前 3 天预约。
119 层有咖啡厅，比 118 层观光厅人少且风景同样绝佳。
experienceTipsEn: Buy tickets online 3 days ahead — ¥30 cheaper than on-site and you skip the queue.
Sunset slots (16:30–18:00) sell out fastest — book early.
The café on floor 119 has fewer crowds and equally stunning views compared to the 118th-floor observatory.

experienceTipsZh: 周一至周四人最少，热门项目排队不超过 20 分钟。
下载上海迪士尼度假区 App 领 FastPass，入园后立即扫码抢热门项目。
可自带食物入园（但玻璃容器和自热食品除外）。
experienceTipsEn: Monday–Thursday has the shortest queues (under 20 min for most rides).
Download the official app and grab FastPass for top rides the moment you enter.
You can bring your own food (no glass containers or self-heating meals).

experienceTipsZh: 寺内素面 ¥15 一碗，只在午市供应（11:00–13:00），强烈推荐。
龙华塔不可攀登，但外观在日落时极美。
农历新年和清明节人潮特别大，建议避开。
experienceTipsEn: The temple's vegetarian noodles (¥15) are legendary but only served 11:00–13:00 — don't miss them.
You can't climb the pagoda but it looks stunning at sunset.
Avoid Chinese New Year and Qingming Festival — extremely crowded.

experienceTipsZh: 松露小笼每天限量 50 份，建议提前电话预约。
蛋炒饭是隐藏王牌，粒粒分明。
接受所有主流外币卡，无需准备人民币现金。
experienceTipsEn: Truffle xiaolongbao are limited to 50 servings/day — call ahead to reserve.
The egg fried rice is a sleeper hit — perfectly textured.
All major foreign credit cards accepted — no need for CNY cash.

experienceTipsZh: 一楼外卖与二楼堂食菜单不同，外卖更本地化更实惠。
注意烫嘴！正确吃法：先咬一小口皮，把汤汁吸出来再吃。
只有中文菜单，但可指图点餐。
experienceTipsEn: Ground floor takeaway and upstairs dine-in have different menus — takeaway is cheaper and more local.
Don't burn your mouth! Proper technique: bite a tiny hole, slurp the soup, then eat.
Chinese-only menu, but you can point at photos to order.

experienceTipsZh: 与蓬皮杜五年合作期间（2019–2024，后延长），展览质量达到国际一线水平。
美术馆附设咖啡厅有英文菜单和免费 Wi-Fi，适合下午茶休憩。
周一闭馆，建议周中下午来访（闭馆 2 小时前入馆人最少）。
experienceTipsEn: During the five-year Pompidou partnership, exhibitions match top international museums. Fully bilingual throughout.
The museum café has English menus, free Wi-Fi, and river views — perfect afternoon break spot.
Closed Mondays. Visit mid-week late afternoon (enter 2 hours before closing for the fewest crowds).

experienceTipsZh: 多数画廊可直接进入不收门票，只有特展可能收费。
Café Dan 是上海外籍艺术家群体的非正式聚集地，周末下午非常热闹。
摄影爱好者：园区内到处是工业风墙壁和涂鸦，极适合出片。
experienceTipsEn: Most galleries are free to enter — only special exhibitions may charge.
Café Dan is the unofficial expat artist hangout — buzzing on weekend afternoons.
Photographers: the whole complex is an Instagram goldmine of industrial walls and graffiti.

experienceTipsZh: 全馆中英双语，语音导览器 ¥20 包含中文/英语/日语/韩语。
建议第一天来上海就来，作为了解城市的「第一站」。参观约 2 小时。
地下一层有免费的上海 2035 规划展示片，每 15 分钟放映一次。
experienceTipsEn: 100% bilingual exhibits. Audio guides (¥20) available in EN/CN/JP/KR.
Make this your first stop in Shanghai — the best way to understand the city. Budget ~2 hours.
The basement theater shows a free 15-min film about Shanghai's 2035 master plan, running every 15 minutes.

experienceTipsZh: 周日 Brunch ¥388/人含无限续杯香槟，需提前 1 周预订。
靠窗景观位每晚 18:00 外滩亮灯，建议预订 17:45 开始的位子看灯光秀。
接受所有主流信用卡。主厨 Paul Pairet 的 Ultraviolet 获米其林三星。
experienceTipsEn: Sunday brunch (¥388/person, free-flow Champagne) — book at least one week ahead.
Bund-facing window seats: the skyline lights up at 18:00. Book for 17:45 to catch the switch-on.
All major credit cards accepted. Chef Paul Pairet also runs Ultraviolet, Shanghai's only 3-Michelin-star restaurant.
